title: rubus surrejanus
intro: Rubus surrejanus, also known as the Red Raspberry or Bramble, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Rubus surrejanus include its ability to aid in menstrual relief, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health. Rubus surrejanus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies for various health issues.
